[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000 1
1 0000000 a
2 0001010 2
3 0010000 1
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 1011000 3
7 0011010 3

01 10 0011000 2
12 21 0010000 1 match 0 3
23 32 0100100 2
34 43 0001001 2

67 76 0000010 1
70 07 0010000 1 match 0 3

35 53 0000000 a match 1 4 5

36 63 0001000 1

26 62 0000000 a match 1 4 5
